hashFloorPolicy.evidence: The hard floor is recomputed from frozen clean-canvas dHash receipts in the current live audit: the largest same-world temporal difference plus one bit. The run fails unless every sampled world clears that derived floor. Static composition distance remains a collision diagnostic, not a rewardable gate.
